authStart.title: How would you like to sign in?
authStart.subtitle: Choose a method to get started.

connectExtension.title: Extension Connected
connectExtension.message: Your browser extension has been successfully connected to Folio. You can now save items directly from your browser.

search.emptyState: Let's find that thing you saved

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.complexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character

pocket.title: Import from Pocket
pocket.description: Connect your Pocket account to import all your saved articles to Folio. This process will:

benefits.importArticles: Import all your saved Pocket articles
benefits.preserveProgress: Preserve your reading progress and tags
benefits.keepAccount: Keep your original Pocket account unchanged

pocket.note: You'll be redirected to Pocket to authorize the import. This is secure and we only read your saved articles.

success.title: Import Started!
success.description: Your Pocket data is being imported in the background. This may take a few minutes depending on how many articles you have saved.
success.note: You can continue using Folio normally. Your imported articles will appear in your saves as they're processed.

addArticle.title: Add to Folio
addArticle.infoText: Save articles, videos, and more to Folio. Your list syncs across devices so you can view it anywhere.

initialSync.subMessage: We're syncing your saved articles. This might take a moment.

favorites.subMessage: Use the star to favorite pages you want saved to keep handy.

tagged.subMessage: Use tags like travel or gift ideas to organize your saves.

archived.subMessage: When you're done with a save, move it here to keep things tidy.

short.subMessage: When you save something quick to read, it'll show up here.

long.subMessage: When you save something quick to read, it'll show up here.

default.subMessage: Add pages you want to come back to. They'll appear here when you're ready.

all.subMessage: Add pages you want to come back to. They'll appear here when you're ready.

restoring.subMessage: Your saved pages are on the way.

sort.subMessage: Use tags list, filter or gift ideas to keep handy.

deleteConfirmation.title: Delete Article
deleteConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to delete this article? This action cannot be undone.
